rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies a real proof-quality issue: `fiberHomeomorph` uses bare `simp` with implicit reliance on `Set.mem_singleton_iff` from the default simp set, making it brittle; changing to `simp only` with explicit lemmas (or a direct `Iff.intro` proof) would improve robustness. Review 1 misses this grounded, actionable finding.
